instruction: I can’t see the website it’s giving me 404 message

QC correction: this site has ZERO images and fails the 5-image launch standard. Use the customer uploaded logo (in lead assets) as the site logo. Source authentic images from their existing website https://linmedia.co.il/ and their Facebook page; add a hero image plus at least 3 supporting images (minimum 5 real images total). No AI-looking stock. Preserve all existing Hebrew RTL copy and the brand.
